name: NMT
description: NMT appears in records as a compound reported in acacia phlebophylla, Acacia confusa Merr., and related herbs. Current source coverage is limited and still developing.
contraindications: Avoid in individuals with psychiatric disorders
Not recommended for those with psychotic disorders or serotonin syndrome risk
